description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script checking the Emacs version with 'emacs --version', then defines three jobs named emacs24, emacs25, and emacs26. Each job uses its specific Docker image (silex/emacs:24.3-dev, silex/emacs:25.3-dev, and silex/emacs:26.1-dev respectively) and runs in the default test stage. In every job execute the shell commands 'make compile' followed by 'make test'. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
